name: VibroSense Charge-Domain MAC Classifier
description: Capacitive charge-sharing MAC (EnCharge-style). 4 parallel neurons x 8 features. Binary-weighted MIM caps (Cunit=50fF). Weights loaded via SPI. Winner-take-all 4-class output.
margin_rule: MAC linearity and cap matching must pass Monte Carlo (100 runs minimum).

mac_linearity_lsb.description: MAC output error vs ideal weighted sum

weight_precision_bits.description: Effective weight precision from cap matching

charge_injection_lsb.description: Charge injection error from switch toggling

computation_time_us.description: Time for one full MAC + compare cycle
